title: TTY-aware output under the git porcelain rule (issue 33)
description: TTY-aware output under the git porcelain rule (issue 33)
acceptance_criteria: TTY output is human-pretty (aligned keys table with bold header, semantic color honoring NO_COLOR) while piped output stays byte-stable plain (TSV, no ANSI); JSON is pretty on TTY and compact when piped for dump and all --json payloads; watch --json aliases --jsonl; keys --quiet prints names only; completion scripts documented; machine shapes additive-only; tests and smoke assert all of it.
